美股與國際市場 ·

ChatGPT在美開放理財串接預覽，Plaid協力與隱私討論升溫ChatGPT debuts US finance linking preview with Plaid as privacy questions rise

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6461103

  • OpenAI向美國ChatGPT Pro用戶推出可連結銀證帳戶的個人財務預覽，並以對話檢視支出、投組與規劃。
  • 產品與Plaid合作，標榜涵蓋大量金融機構；儀表板彙整投資表現、消費、訂閱與即將到期款項。
  • 公司透露下一步擬整合Intuit，以便延伸賣股稅務影響、信用卡核准機率等較進階分析。
  • 此功能距併購個人財務新創Hiro核心團隊約一個月；OpenAI並稱GPT-5.5與財務專家基準有助優化理財回答。
  • 隱私面可在設定中斷連結，官方稱同步財務資料將於三十日內刪除，並可於財務頁清除相關記憶。

OpenAI在美對ChatGPT Pro推出可綁金融帳戶的理財預覽，透過Plaid串接機構並以儀表與對話呈現投資與消費等資訊，後續擬接Intuit強化稅務與授信情境分析；併購Hiro團隊後快速上線並強調模型與基準測試優化。隱私上可解除連結，官方稱斷線後資料三十日內刪除。

  • OpenAI rolls out a U.S. ChatGPT Pro finance preview that links bank and brokerage accounts for conversational spending, portfolio, and planning help.
  • The feature pairs with Plaid across a broad set of institutions and surfaces investments, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments in a dashboard.
  • OpenAI plans future Intuit integration to deepen analysis such as tax effects of stock sales and odds of credit approval.
  • The launch follows the recent Hiro team acquisition; GPT-5.5 and finance expert benchmarks are pitched to improve money Q&A quality.
  • Users can disconnect linked accounts in settings; synced finance data is slated for full deletion within 30 days, with manual memory removal offered.

OpenAI previews US ChatGPT Pro finance linking via Plaid, eyes Intuit for richer tax and credit insights post-Hiro deal, and touts GPT-5.5 tuning wit…
